label: 自动碰撞体（全部 part）
description: 为 Geometry 里所有 part 从 visual 自动派生 <collision>（对标 articraft exact_collisions.py）。原生 primitive 精确复制：box→box、cylinder→cylinder(沿Z)、sphere→sphere；其余（CSG/Parts/Gears/mesh/transform）用 AABB box 兜底；无法解析 AABB 的（mesh/未注册 op）跳过。已有显式 collision 的 part 默认跳过，replace=true 时先清空所有 collision。当 prompt 提到 碰撞体 / 碰撞 / collision / 物理 / 仿真 且希望一次性自动生成时使用。
description-en: Auto-derive <collision> for every part from its visual (akin to articraft exact_collisions.py). Native primitives are copied exactly: box→box, cylinder→cylinder(along Z), sphere→sphere; everything else (CSG/Parts/Gears/mesh/transform) falls back to an AABB box; parts whose AABB cannot be resolved (mesh/unregistered op) are skipped. Parts with explicit collisions are skipped by default; replace=true clears all collisions first.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（含 part 及其引用的 shape）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry containing parts and their referenced shapes.

inputs.name: primitive_exact
inputs.label: primitive 精确复制
inputs.description: true = box/cylinder/sphere 用同形精确 collision；false = 全部 part 都用 AABB box
inputs.description-en: true = copy box/cylinder/sphere exactly; false = AABB-box every part.

inputs.name: padding
inputs.label: 外扩 (m)
inputs.description: 碰撞体各向同性外扩量（米）

inputs.name: min_size
inputs.label: 最小尺寸 (m)
inputs.description: 碰撞体最小尺寸，防止薄板退化为零体积
inputs.description-en: Minimum collision extent to avoid zero-volume collisions.

inputs.name: replace
inputs.label: 替换现有 collision
inputs.description: true → 先删除所有现有 collision 语句再重新派生
inputs.description-en: When true, drop all existing collision statements before re-deriving.

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加 collision 后的 Geometry

outputs.name: added
outputs.label: 新增数
outputs.description: 新增的 collision 语句数

outputs.name: skipped
outputs.label: 跳过数
outputs.description: 因已有 collision / 无法解析 AABB 而跳过的 part 数
outputs.description-en: Parts skipped due to existing collisions or unresolved AABB.
